all options and logs from the build

audio/openal-soft fails to compile either as part of a build build or with testport option.

Tried with the following commands:
poudriere options -j 10rel2amd64 -p local -z crayon2 -f 10rel2amd64-local-crayon2-pkglist

poudriere testport -j 10rel2amd64 -p local -z crayon2 -o audio/openal-soft

In the attached file all options and logs from the build
